basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) Professor of Practice Notification 2026 has been released on 16 July 2026 on the official website https://www.nitt.edu/. The NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 has been announced for the post of Professor of Practice. The number of vacancies has not been specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor degree in Engineering/Architecture or Master’s degree in Sciences/Humanities/Management/Education/Law or CA/CFA etc. with minimum 15 years of technical/professional experience
qualification.details: Minimum 15 years technical/professional experience with at least Bachelor degree in Engineering/Architecture or Master’s degree in Sciences/Humanities/Management/Education/Law or CA/CFA etc. Ph.D. welcome but not essential. Not open to teaching profession.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,20,000 per month plus up to Rs. 40,000 allowance

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum 15 years technical/professional experience with at least Bachelor degree in Engineering/Architecture or Master’s degree in Sciences/Humanities/Management/Education/Law or CA/CFA etc. Ph.D. welcome but not essential. Not open to teaching profession.

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Age Limit 2026
NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 1,20,000 per month plus up to Rs. 40,000 allowance

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Professor of Practice post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Professor of Practice position is 14th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Architecture or a Master's degree in Sciences/Humanities/Management/Education/Law or CA/CFA, along with a minimum of 15 years of technical/professional experience.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for the NIT Tiruchirappalli recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Professor of Practice post is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professor of Practice role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 1,20,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 per month, with potential allowances up to Rs. 40,000.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it along with required documents to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Professor of Practice post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Professor of Practice position is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITT/R/PoP/2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIT Tiruchirappalli located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli is located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 620015.
